summary: In this masterclass, Bhartendra Singh sits down with Niranjan Awasthi, Senior Vice President at Edelweiss Mutual Fund, to decode mutual fund investing — the myths, the methods, and the mindset you need.

chapters.label: Introduction and Guest Background
Why are there 36+ Mutual Fund Categories?
How to Choose Your First Few Mutual Funds? : T.I.M.E Framework
Understanding Equity Fund Types (Large, Mid, Flexi, Multi)
Building a Starter Portfolio (2-3 Funds That Matter)
Should You Still Invest in ELSS under New Tax Regime?
When, How and Why to Add Another Fund to Your Portfolio?
Are NFOs Worth It? How to Evaluate Them
Rolling Returns - How to Understand the Return of Mutual Funds?
Should Investors Look at Fund Portfolios?
Should You Track Macroeconomics?
What is Valuation (P/E, P/B)? & Timing vs Time in the Market
Is Gold Really a Risk-Free Asset?
Has Equity Always Delivered in the Long Term?
Can Your Entire Portfolio Be Built With Mutual Funds?
What to Do If someone has 30+ Mutual Funds?
Can Debt Funds Be Long-Term Investments Too?
Target Maturity Funds Explained
Common Investor Mistakes That Hurt Portfolio Returns
When to Exit a Mutual Fund
How to Review Your Portfolio Every 6 Months
Should You Include NPS, EPF?
Why You Must Top Up Your SIPs
Market Outlook & Setting Realistic Return Expectations
Is SIP a Scam? Why It Works Even in the Short Term
Can Equity Funds Be Used for Short-Term Tactical Goals?
Niranjan Awasthi on His Upcoming Book & Final Advice

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.

disclaimer: This video is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute personal financial advice. Individual circumstances may vary. Please consult a qualified financial advisor before making any investment decisions. All views expressed are personal and do not represent any organization.
